Engineering Blog

Updates, deep dives, and behind-the-scenes from the DevRef team.

Migrating to v3: What Changed

A comprehensive look at the breaking changes in v3, why we made them, and how to update your project with minimal effort. Includes a step-by-step migration checklist.

March 8, 2026 · DevRef Team

How We Cut Build Times by 60%

Our incremental build pipeline now resolves dependencies at the module level instead of rebuilding the full graph. Here's the architecture behind the improvement.

February 21, 2026 · DevRef Team

Introducing Plugin API 2.0

The new plugin system supports lifecycle hooks, shared context, and hot reloading. Build integrations that feel native to DevRef without forking the core.

February 5, 2026 · DevRef Team
